calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jan-26-2026 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Mar-06-29 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Pursuant To Ccp 437c
Off Calendar Dec-19-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, NA'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO CCP437C

No appearances. The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: The motion for summary judgment is denied pursuant to Code of Civil Procedure, section 437c, subdivision (h), which permits the court to deny summary judgment where the opposing party provides evidence "that facts essential to justify opposition may exist but cannot, for reasons stated, be presented." The court construes defendant's motion for continuance as an opposition to summary judgment based on 437c, subdivision (h), and concludes that the opportunity to depose custodians to ensure that Wells Fargo's moving papers present evidence that the court may accept under applicable hearsay rules makes a satisfactory showing under that rule. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Christine Van Aken, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported

Motion To Continue Hearing On Plaintiff'S Motion For Summary Judgment Pursuant To Ccp Section 437c(H); Declaration Of Adam C. Fullman
Off Calendar Dec-18-2025 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances via Zoom Conference

Alisa Kim, Esq., for Plaintiff WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. (specially appearing)

Christopher J. Peters, Esq., THE FULLMAN FIRM, PC (888) 922-2367 eservice@fullmanfirm.com Attorney for Defendant GIOVANI RIVERA.

Heaering held. Discussed, not argued. Court rules as follows:

DEFENDANT GIOVANI ALFARO'S Motion To Continue Hearing On Plaintiff'S Motion For Summary Judgment Pursuant To Ccp Section 437c(H). DENIED. Court treats this motion as an opposition to Summary Judgment based on CCP 437c,subdivsion (h).

Order is prepared and signed by Court.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/CVA)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-18-2025 Set For Trial On Jan-26-26 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
